overrideNotes.minimatch, rollup, glob: vitest/vite toolchain — review on vite 6 upgrade
overrideNotes.@mikro-orm/core: medusa transitive fix — GHSA-gwhv-j974-6fxm / GHSA-qpfv-44f3-qqx6 SQL injection
overrideNotes.lodash: medusa/prisma transitive fix — GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc code injection via _.template
overrideNotes.@types/react, @types/react-dom: medusa pulls React 18 types — force single version to fix JSX portability errors
overrideNotes.vite@7: vitest>vite v7 transitive fix — GHSA-v2wj-q39q-566r (server.fs.deny bypass) + GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583 (WebSocket file read). Scoped to v7 so medusa's vite v5 is untouched. Remove when vitest pulls vite >= 7.3.2.
overrideNotes.ajv: @medusajs/cli>...>@rushstack/node-core-library>ajv transitive fix — GHSA-2g4f-4pwh-qvx6 ReDoS via $data option. Remove when rushstack updates.
overrideNotes.esbuild: @medusajs/framework>vite v5>esbuild transitive fix — GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 dev-server CORS issue. Remove when medusa upgrades vite to v6+ (vite 6.4.2+ already pulls esbuild >=0.25).

ignoreCveNotes.CVE-2026-35042: fast-jwt <=6.1.0 GHSA-hm7r-c7qw-ghp6 — accepts unknown `crit` header extensions (RFC 7515 violation). No upstream patch released yet. Mitigation: we never set or trust `crit` headers in our JWT flow (Twilio Verify OTP only). Re-check when nearform/fast-jwt ships a fix.
ignoreCveNotes.GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9: Documentation only — not enforced (pnpm ignoreCves only matches CVE-* IDs). vite <=6.4.1 path traversal in optimized deps .map handling. Pulled by @medusajs/framework which has a hard peer dep on `vite ^5.4.21`, so we cannot override to 6.4.2+ without breaking medusa's admin-vite-plugin. Dev-server-only vuln, not exploitable in production builds. Stays as a moderate in audit output (below the --audit-level=high CI threshold). Remove when medusa upgrades to vite v6+.
